locations.name: 哈勒尔
locations.summary: 哈勒尔（阿姆哈拉語：ሐረር；哈勒尔语：ሀረር；奧羅莫語：Adare Biyyo；索馬里語：Herer；阿拉伯語：هرر）是埃塞俄比亚东部城市，也是哈勒尔州现代经济、资本和行政首府。这个城市位于一个山头，海拔1885米，在埃塞俄比亚高原的东…

locations.name: Hanger River
locations.summary: The Hanger (also transliterated Angar River) is a river in west central Ethiopia.

relations.subject: Abyssinian woodpecker
relations.evidence: It is native to Africa, where it occurs in Eritrea and Ethiopia. It appears to be a close relative of the cardinal woodpecker Dendropicos fuscescens
